sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN u.start_date IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
        WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < 1 THEN '< 1 year'
        ELSE '1+ years'
    END AS tenure_group,
    e.category,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declined,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM flag_21 e
JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
GROUP BY tenure_group, e.category
ORDER BY tenure_group, decline_rate_pct DESC;

sql:
SELECT 
    amount_bucket,
    tenure_group,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declined,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM (
    SELECT 
        e.state AS e_state,
        CASE 
            WHEN e.amount < 1000 THEN '< $1k'
            WHEN e.amount < 2000 THEN '$1k-2k'
            WHEN e.amount < 3000 THEN '$2k-3k'
            WHEN e.amount < 5000 THEN '$3k-5k'
            ELSE '$5k+'
        END AS amount_bucket,
        CASE 
            WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < 1 THEN '< 1 year'
            ELSE '1+ years'
        END AS tenure_group
    FROM flag_21 e
    JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
    WHERE u.start_date IS NOT NULL
) sub
GROUP BY amount_bucket, tenure_group
ORDER BY tenure_group,
    CASE amount_bucket
        WHEN '< $1k' THEN 1
        WHEN '$1k-2k' THEN 2
        WHEN '$2k-3k' THEN 3
        WHEN '$3k-5k' THEN 4
        ELSE 5
    END;

sql:
SELECT 
    dept,
    category,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declined,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS decline_rate_pct,
    ROUND(AVG(amount)) AS avg_amount
FROM (
    SELECT 
        e.state AS e_state,
        e.department AS dept,
        e.category AS category,
        e.amount AS amount,
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) AS tenure_years
    FROM flag_21 e
    JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
    WHERE u.start_date IS NOT NULL
) sub
WHERE tenure_years < 1
  AND dept IN ('Development', 'Finance', 'HR')
GROUP BY dept, category
ORDER BY dept, decline_rate_pct DESC;

sql:
SELECT 
    ci,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declined,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM (
    SELECT 
        e.ci,
        e.state,
        FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / 86400.0)::int AS days_since_hire
    FROM flag_21 e
    JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
    WHERE u.start_date IS NOT NULL
      AND e.opened_at >= u.start_date
) sub
WHERE days_since_hire BETWEEN 0 AND 4
GROUP BY ci
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
ORDER BY decline_rate_pct DESC, total DESC
LIMIT 20;

sql:
SELECT 
    u.name,
    u.department,
    u.start_date::date AS hire_date,
    COUNT(*) AS submissions_in_first_5_days,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declined
FROM flag_21 e
JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
WHERE u.start_date IS NOT NULL
  AND e.opened_at >= u.start_date
  AND FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / 86400.0)::int BETWEEN 0 AND 4
GROUP BY u.name, u.department, u.start_date
ORDER BY declined DESC, submissions_in_first_5_days DESC;

sql:
SELECT 
    CASE WHEN u.manager IS NULL THEN 'No Manager' ELSE 'Has Manager' END AS manager_status,
    CASE 
        WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < 1 THEN '< 1 year'
        ELSE '1+ years'
    END AS tenure_group,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declined,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN e.state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS decline_rate_pct
FROM flag_21 e
JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
WHERE u.start_date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY manager_status, tenure_group
ORDER BY tenure_group, decline_rate_pct DESC;

sql:
SELECT 
    days_bucket,
    COUNT(*) AS total_submissions,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS declined,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS decline_rate_pct,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(SUM(CASE WHEN e_state = 'Declined' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) OVER (), 2) AS pct_of_all_declines
FROM (
    SELECT 
        e.state AS e_state,
        CASE 
            WHEN u.start_date IS NULL THEN 'Unknown start'
            WHEN FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (e.opened_at - u.start_date)) / 86400.0)::int BETWEEN 0 AND 4 THEN 'Days 0-4 (onboarding)'
            WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM AGE(e.opened_at, u.start_date)) < 1 THEN 'Days 5-364'
            ELSE '1+ years'
        END AS days_bucket
    FROM flag_21 e
    JOIN flag_21_sysuser u ON e.user = u.name
) sub
GROUP BY days_bucket
ORDER BY pct_of_all_declines DESC;
